BrakeInfoStatus (CAN).comment: Brake information status received from ABS

AT_TorqueControlType (CAN).comment: Type of torque control performed to the engine

CrankingAuthorization_AT (CAN).comment: Autorization by the gearbox for engine to crank

CruiseControlStatus_forTM (CAN).comment: Type of cruise control running (speed limiter or cruise control)

lists.1: Exact torque request cannot be achieved (mesure imprecision)
lists.2: Transient state preventing torque request realization
lists.3: Torque request can not be achieved

ECM_TorqueRequestStatus (CAN).comment: Type of torque request sent by gearbox to the engine

Line pressure solenoid current.comment: Current detected value of line pressure solenoid

Secondary pressure solenoid current.comment: Current detected value of secondary pressure solenoid

Self-learning flag.comment: Flag that indicates the writing in EEprom is well done

Engine torque.comment: Actual torque delivered by the engine

lists.2375: Electric Oil Pump - Power supply system Failure
lists.2402: Line Pressure (P/L) Solenoid Failure(shorted to ground)
lists.1813: Primary pully speed sensor failure (at low speed)
lists.1824: Output speed sensor failure (at low speed)
lists.1810: Oil temperature sensor failure(shorted to ground)
lists.1811: Oil temperature sensor failure(opened or shorted to power supply)
lists.1815: Primary pully speed sensor failure (during driving)
lists.10085: Secondary pully speed sensor failure(At low speed)
lists.1856: Lock-up (L/U) Solenoid Failure(opened or shorted to power supply)
lists.2119: Secondary pressure sensor failure (shorted to ground)
lists.2120: Secondary pressure failure (opened or shorted to power supply)
lists.2403: Line Pressure (P/L) Solenoid Failure(opened or shorted to power supply)
lists.2459: High clutch / Reverse clutch (H/R) Solenoid failure - LOW
lists.2460: High clutch / Reverse clutch (H/R) Solenoid failure -HIGH
lists.10328: High clutch / Reverse clutch (H/R) Solenoid failure - Neutral
lists.10330: High clutch / Reverse clutch (H/R) Solenoid failure - Interlock
lists.10087: Secondary pully speed sensor failure(During driving)

Current Failure.comment: Indicating if the failure is always present or not

lists.0: No possible classification about the type of fault
lists.20: Open circuit or short circuit to ground
lists.21: Open circuit or short circuit to power supply

Target step motor displacement.comment: Desired step motor displacement regarding initial position

AT_MinimumIdleSpeedRequest (CAN).comment: Minimum requested value of engine idle speed

Lock-up solenoid current.comment: Current detected value of lock-up solenoid

Gear engaged in manual mode.comment: Gear engaged (from 1 to 8) when gearbox running in manual mode

Gear Ratio.comment: Current gear ratio (primary pulley speed/secondary pulley speed)

ATF Deterioration Level.comment: This data must be Numeric, 32bits, resolution 1 in CLIP Tool. DDT not suppport 32bits Numeric.

RoutineEntryStatus_1.comment: Routine entry status for recive data
